exam_name: NALA Certified Paralegal (CP) / Certified Legal Assistant (CLA)
exam_format: Linear; CP exam is two separate parts (General Knowledge + Specialty Law)
exam_price_notes: Member fee $250; nonmember fee $275. Exam has two parts: General Knowledge and Specialty Law. Both parts must be passed (75% each) to earn certification.

testing_centers.notes: Online proctored via ExamSoft; requires webcam, microphone, and stable internet
Computer-based testing at Pearson VUE test centers (availability may vary)

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID. Name must match NALA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials permitted. No personal items in testing area. Multiple-choice format only.
renewal_options: CP/CLA and PACE certifications valid for 5 years. Renewal requires 50 CE credits earned through NALA-approved continuing education. Credits may include legal seminars, webinars, self-study courses, and professional development activities. A minimum number of credits must be NALA-approved.

prerequisites.description: One of the following: (1) Graduation from an ABA-approved paralegal program; (2) Graduation from a paralegal program at an accredited school with at least 60 semester hours; (3) Bachelor's degree plus 1 year of paralegal experience; (4) High school diploma/equivalent plus 7 years of paralegal experience under attorney supervision

retake_policy.notes: Contact NALA for current retake waiting period and fee structure. Full exam fee required for retake attempts.

official_study_resources.title: NALA CP/CLA Exam Preparation Materials
official_study_resources.notes: Official study guides, practice questions, and content outlines available from NALA

aliases: nala certified paralegal cp certified legal assistant cla
